plot outline: A touching tale of a wayward young man who struggles to find his identity, living in a world where he can solve any problem, except the one brewing deep within himself, until one day he meets his soul mate who opens his mind and his heart.
title: Good Will Hunting
akas: Good Will Hunting: Der gute Will Hunting (Germany)
